metadata.description: Curated sources for production agent systems: control flow, tool interfaces, safety boundaries, evaluation, observability, economics, and ROI.

standards_and_governance.name: EU AI Act (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689)
standards_and_governance.relevance: Regulatory baseline for risk classification, transparency, documentation, and controls affecting agent systems.

standards_and_governance.name: NIST AI Risk Management Framework 1.0
standards_and_governance.relevance: Governance and risk management framework for production AI systems.

standards_and_governance.name: NIST Generative AI Profile (AI 600-1)
standards_and_governance.relevance: GenAI-specific profile aligned to NIST AI RMF; useful for logging, controls, and safety mapping.

standards_and_governance.name: OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications
standards_and_governance.relevance: Threat categories for prompt injection, data leakage, tool misuse, and agent abuse scenarios.

standards_and_governance.name: NIST Secure Software Development Framework (SSDF)
standards_and_governance.relevance: Secure development baseline relevant for tool implementation, supply chain, and deployment practices.

standards_and_governance.name: ISO/IEC 42001 (AI management system)
standards_and_governance.relevance: AI management system standard for organizational governance and continuous improvement.

protocols_and_interoperability.name: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Documentation
protocols_and_interoperability.relevance: Interoperability standard for connecting models/agents to tools and data sources via a consistent protocol.

protocols_and_interoperability.name: JSON Schema
protocols_and_interoperability.relevance: Schema standard for tool I/O validation, handoff contracts, and structured outputs.

protocols_and_interoperability.name: OpenTelemetry Semantic Conventions for GenAI
protocols_and_interoperability.relevance: Standardized telemetry fields for LLM calls, tool calls, and agent tracing.

agent_patterns_and_research.name: ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models
agent_patterns_and_research.relevance: Core pattern for tool use with interleaved reasoning and actions; informs agent loop design.

agent_patterns_and_research.name: Chain-of-Thought Prompting Elicits Reasoning in Large Language Models
agent_patterns_and_research.relevance: Foundational prompting technique; informs when hidden reasoning may help (do not require full traces in production).

agent_patterns_and_research.name: Toolformer
agent_patterns_and_research.relevance: Reference for learning tool-use behaviors; useful for understanding tool calling failure modes.

agent_patterns_and_research.name: Reflexion
agent_patterns_and_research.relevance: Reflection-based improvement pattern; useful for designing bounded self-critique loops with eval gates.

agent_patterns_and_research.name: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
agent_patterns_and_research.relevance: Foundational RAG architecture; relevant for agentic RAG and grounding/citation design.

implementation_docs_and_playbooks.name: OpenAI Agents Guide
implementation_docs_and_playbooks.relevance: Example implementation patterns for tool use, memory, and agent workflows (provider-specific).

implementation_docs_and_playbooks.name: Anthropic Tool Use Documentation
implementation_docs_and_playbooks.relevance: Provider-specific reference for tool calling and agent/tool interfaces.

implementation_docs_and_playbooks.name: LangGraph Documentation
implementation_docs_and_playbooks.relevance: Example workflow/state-machine framework for deterministic agent control flow (tooling example).

implementation_docs_and_playbooks.name: OpenAI Evals
implementation_docs_and_playbooks.relevance: Reference for building evaluation harnesses and regression tests (tooling example).

implementation_docs_and_playbooks.name: OpenTelemetry Documentation
implementation_docs_and_playbooks.relevance: Implementation reference for distributed tracing/metrics/logs supporting auditability of agents in production.

agent_frameworks_2026.name: OpenAI Agents SDK
agent_frameworks_2026.relevance: Lightweight, production-ready agent framework from OpenAI (March 2025). Tool-centric, easy onboarding, supports handoffs.

agent_frameworks_2026.name: Google Agent Development Kit (ADK)
agent_frameworks_2026.relevance: Code-first, model-agnostic framework optimized for Gemini. Available in Python, TypeScript, Go, Java.

agent_frameworks_2026.name: Pydantic AI (v1.66.0)
agent_frameworks_2026.relevance: Type-safe Python agent framework (V1 GA Sep 2025). First-class MCP client (Stdio/SSE/StreamableHTTP), native A2A via to_a2a(), pydantic-graph FSM, durable execution with Prefect, HITL, TestModel/FunctionModel testing, OpenTelemetry + Logfire.

agent_frameworks_2026.name: AWS Bedrock Agents
agent_frameworks_2026.relevance: Enterprise agent framework with managed infrastructure, knowledge bases, and action groups.

agent_frameworks_2026.name: CrewAI Documentation
agent_frameworks_2026.relevance: Role-based multi-agent framework. Easiest onboarding, best for fast prototyping and team-based workflows.

agent_frameworks_2026.name: Microsoft Agent Framework (Semantic Kernel + AutoGen)
agent_frameworks_2026.relevance: Unified Microsoft agent framework (RC Feb 2026, GA Q1 2026). Merges Semantic Kernel + AutoGen. Python, .NET, Java. Enterprise Azure integration, multi-agent orchestration.

agent_frameworks_2026.name: Anthropic Claude Agent SDK
agent_frameworks_2026.relevance: Official Anthropic agent SDK (May 2025). Python + TypeScript. Deep MCP integration, Computer Use, built-in tools (Bash, TextEditor), guardrails. Powers Claude Code. 1.85M+ weekly npm downloads.

agent_frameworks_2026.name: LlamaIndex Workflows
agent_frameworks_2026.relevance: Event-driven workflow system for RAG-native agents. 35k+ GitHub stars. llama-agents for microservice-based multi-agent. Strong retrieval foundation.

agent_frameworks_2026.name: Mastra
agent_frameworks_2026.relevance: TypeScript-first agent framework from Gatsby team (YC-backed). Built on Vercel AI SDK. Leading choice for TypeScript/Next.js teams.

agent_frameworks_2026.name: SmolAgents (HuggingFace)
agent_frameworks_2026.relevance: Minimalist ~1000-line agent framework. Code-first (write Python not JSON tool calls). 30% fewer LLM calls. Model-agnostic, Hub integration for sharing.

agent_frameworks_2026.name: Agno (formerly Phidata)
agent_frameworks_2026.relevance: Production runtime for agentic software. Teams, workflows, guardrails, 100+ integrations, FastAPI-native. Growing fast.

agent_frameworks_2026.name: Haystack (deepset)
agent_frameworks_2026.relevance: Enterprise RAG+agents pipeline. Used by Airbus, Economist, NVIDIA. Strong pipeline orchestration, component-based architecture.

agent_frameworks_2026.name: DSPy (Stanford)
agent_frameworks_2026.relevance: Declarative optimization approach — compiles programs into prompts/weights. Unique niche: replace manual prompt engineering with learned optimizations.

mcp_ecosystem_2026.name: MCP Specification (2025-11-25)
mcp_ecosystem_2026.relevance: Latest MCP specification. Protocol now governed by Agentic AI Foundation (Linux Foundation) since Dec 2025.

mcp_ecosystem_2026.name: MCP Security Best Practices (Red Hat)
mcp_ecosystem_2026.relevance: Security analysis of MCP: prompt injection, tool permissions, lookalike tools, confused deputy attacks.

economics_and_decision_frameworks.name: OpenAI API Pricing
economics_and_decision_frameworks.relevance: Current token pricing for GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, and other models. Essential for ROI calculations.

economics_and_decision_frameworks.name: Anthropic API Pricing
economics_and_decision_frameworks.relevance: Current token pricing for Claude 4.5/4.6 family (Opus, Sonnet, Haiku). Essential for ROI calculations.

economics_and_decision_frameworks.name: Google AI Pricing (Gemini)
economics_and_decision_frameworks.relevance: Current token pricing for Gemini 3 family (Pro, Flash) and other models. Essential for ROI calculations.

economics_and_decision_frameworks.name: Anthropic: Building Effective Agents
economics_and_decision_frameworks.relevance: Anthropic's guidance on agent architectures, when to use agents vs workflows, and production patterns.

economics_and_decision_frameworks.name: a]6z: AI Agents Primer
economics_and_decision_frameworks.relevance: Venture capital perspective on agent economics, market sizing, and business model considerations.

economics_and_decision_frameworks.name: Hallucination Leaderboard (Vectara)
economics_and_decision_frameworks.relevance: Benchmark for model hallucination rates. Essential for risk assessment and mitigation planning.
